use_cases: Displaying user profile pictures in navigation headers and dropdowns
Showing author or contributor avatars next to content like comments, posts, or articles
User identification in team dashboards, collaboration tools, or admin panels
Displaying avatars in user lists, card components, or member directories
Profile pictures in messaging, chat interfaces, or notification systems
ai_summary: A lightweight Avatar component built on Radix UI that displays user profile images with automatic fallback support. The component renders circular profile pictures with graceful degradation to initials or placeholder backgrounds when images fail to load. Designed as a reusable atomic component for user identity display across various interface contexts.
